chart_of_accounts.name: Accounts Receivable
chart_of_accounts.description: Money owed by customers from credit sales

chart_of_accounts.name: Accrued Wages Payable
chart_of_accounts.description: Employee wages earned but not yet paid

chart_of_accounts.name: Accrued Expenses
chart_of_accounts.description: Expenses incurred but not yet billed (utilities, etc.)

chart_of_accounts.name: VAT Output (PPN Keluaran)
chart_of_accounts.description: VAT collected on sales, owed to government

chart_of_accounts.name: Income Tax Payable (PPh 23)
chart_of_accounts.description: Tax on services/rent paid to others

chart_of_accounts.name: Retained Earnings
chart_of_accounts.description: Accumulated net profit from prior years

chart_of_accounts.name: Current Year Earnings
chart_of_accounts.description: Net profit/loss for the current year

chart_of_accounts.name: Miscellaneous Income
chart_of_accounts.description: Scrap sales, commissions, other small income

chart_of_accounts.name: Factory Overhead - Supplies
chart_of_accounts.description: Needles, oils, cleaning supplies for machines

chart_of_accounts.name: Shipping & Delivery (Out)
chart_of_accounts.description: Cost to ship products to customers

sales.name: Credit Sale (with PPN)
sales.tax_impact: PPN 11% on invoice, Faktur Pajak required

sales.name: Customer Down Payment Received
sales.tax_impact: PPN due on DP receipt per PMK 2021

sales.name: DP Applied to Final Invoice
sales.detection_logic: Link DP payment to sales order fulfilled

sales.name: Sales Return (Credit Note)
sales.detection_logic: Return note linked to original invoice
sales.tax_impact: PPN reversal via Faktur Pajak Pengganti

sales.name: Sales Discount Given
sales.tax_impact: No PPN impact if discount on payment

purchasing.name: Purchase Raw Materials (Credit)
purchasing.detection_logic: GRN matched with PO, invoice received

purchasing.name: Purchase Raw Materials (Cash)
purchasing.tax_impact: Claim PPN Masukan if Faktur Pajak exists

payroll.name: Record Monthly Salary
payroll.detection_logic: Payroll module calculates gross to net

payroll.name: Record THR Payment
payroll.detection_logic: THR calculation triggered by HR module

fixed_assets.name: Monthly Depreciation - Machinery
fixed_assets.tax_impact: Deductible per PMK useful life rules

fixed_assets.name: Asset Write-off (Fully Depreciated)
fixed_assets.tax_impact: No tax impact if fully depreciated

tax.name: Monthly PPN Settlement
tax.tax_impact: SPT Masa PPN filing by end of month+1

operating_expenses.name: Marketing Expense (Online Ads)
operating_expenses.tax_impact: PPN if domestic; No PPN if Google/Meta direct

financial.name: Foreign Exchange Gain (Realized)
financial.detection_logic: Compare transaction rate vs booking rate

financial.name: Foreign Exchange Loss (Realized)
financial.detection_logic: Compare transaction rate vs booking rate

financial.name: Owner Draws Money (Prive)
financial.tax_impact: Not deductible, not taxable at entity level

adjusting_entries.name: Accrue Employee Bonus
adjusting_entries.tax_impact: Deductible when paid, PPh 21 on payment

tangible_assets.examples: Computers, printers, phones, small tools, office furniture
Metal furniture, vehicles (non-sedan), heavy tools, AC units

special_rules.rule: Only 50% of depreciation is tax-deductible if used for mixed (personal+business) purpose
Depreciate over the shorter of lease term or asset useful life

erp_detection_rules.action: Post journal: Dr Cash, Cr Revenue + PPN
Post journal: Dr AR, Cr Revenue + PPN

erp_detection_rules.trigger: Return note linked to original invoice
Payment amount < invoice amount within discount terms

erp_detection_rules.action: Post journal: Dr Inventory + PPN, Cr AP

erp_detection_rules.trigger: Payment to vendor with NPWP on file
Material requisition approved for production order
Production order status = COMPLETED + QC passed
PO item_type = CAPEX and amount > threshold
erp_detection_rules.action: Create asset record instead of expense
Calculate & post depreciation for all active assets
Post disposal entry with gain/loss calc

erp_detection_rules.trigger: Asset type = SEDAN and usage = MIXED
Month-end: sum PPN Keluaran vs PPN Masukan
Payment to vendor triggers PPh withholding
erp_detection_rules.validation: Match vendor category to PPh type
Based on prior year annual PPh
Check amounts match prior month calc

erp_detection_rules.action: Flag for doubtful debt provision review

ppn.who_pays: Collected from buyer, paid to DJP
Paid to supplier, claimed from DJP

pph.applied_to: Services: accounting, legal, technical, management, rent (non-land/building)
Land/building rent, construction services, bank interest
Payments to foreign entities (services, royalties, dividends)
